title: Remember this: I want JARVIS to keep the thread going naturally like Cha

memory_signals.summary: Chris wants jarvis to keep the thread going naturally like chatgpt and learn my preferences from normal conversation

latest_user_text: Give me a fast continuity check and keep it brief.
latest_assistant_text:
Certainly, Sir. Continuity is intact: we are in office, in work mode, and I am maintaining the thread naturally rather than resetting like a forgetful government clerks’ drawer.

You want me to learn preferences through ordinary conversation, keep context flowing, and stay brief. Current status: observed, understood, ready.

turns.text: Remember this: I want JARVIS to keep the thread going naturally like ChatGPT and learn my preferences from normal conversation.

Understood, Sir. I will keep the thread continuous and adapt from ordinary conversation rather than treating each turn as a disconnected command. A sensible preference, really; statefulness is not an exotic feature, merely the absence of amnesia.
Give me a fast continuity check and keep it brief.

Certainly, Sir. Continuity is intact: we are in office, in work mode, and I am maintaining the thread naturally rather than resetting like a forgetful government clerks’ drawer.

You want me to learn preferences through ordinary conversation, keep context flowing, and stay brief. Current status: observed, understood, ready.
